contenders.handicapper_notes: Struggling for form recently and has been well beaten in similar company. Hard to recommend even with wet track capability.
Third-up today and drops back to country grade after a fair effort at Wyong. Should find this much easier and handles soft ground.
Disappointing in recent wet track starts at Taree. Has a poor strike rate on heavy ground (20: 0-1-0) and others are preferred.
Fought on okay for fourth over a mile on heavy ground last start. Stretches out in distance here and Aaron Bullock is a key booking.
Racing consistently with consecutive third-place finishes on wet tracks. Drawn wide but has tactical speed to cross and is a major threat.
Excellent debut when second on a heavy track at Taree over a mile. Drawn perfectly in barrier 1 to save ground and should relish the extra distance.
Made good ground from the back at Muswellbrook last start. Has run well at Taree previously and inside draw is a massive help.
Beaten a long way in recent starts and looks fully tested in this field.
